sources.title: Zhipu AI Python SDK - Chat Completions Source Code
keyInsights: thinking parameter type is 'object | None', passed directly to API body without transformation
Temperature auto-clamped to (0.01, 0.99) range
top_p auto-clamped to (0.01, 0.99) range
do_sample set to False when temperature <= 0
Endpoint path is /chat/completions
Default base URL: https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/

sources.title: Cairn GLM Provider - Production Go Implementation
keyInsights: thinking parameter is object {type: 'enabled' | 'disabled'}, NOT boolean
reasoning_content is separate field from content in streaming delta
finish_reason 'network_error' is GLM-specific and retryable
Tool call arguments stream as fragments, must be concatenated by index
Default base URL: https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4
Auth: Bearer token (id.secret format)
Models: glm-5-turbo, glm-4.7 with 128K context

sources.title: Cairn GLM Provider Tests
keyInsights: SSE format: data: {json}\n\n with [DONE] sentinel
Reasoning content streams before main content
Tool calls assembled from fragmented chunks by index
HTTP 429 returns error with status code
System message is first in messages array
Multiple parallel tool calls supported

sources.title: Cairn LLM Types - Provider-Agnostic Event Model
keyInsights: Event types: TextDelta, ReasoningDelta, ToolCallDelta, MessageEnd, StreamError
ReasoningBlock is a first-class content block type
StreamError has Retryable flag for GLM network_error handling

sources.title: Cairn OpenAI Provider - Comparison Implementation
keyInsights: GLM and OpenAI share identical request format for messages, tools, and basic params
GLM adds: thinking parameter, reasoning_content in delta, network_error finish reason
OpenAI delta does NOT have reasoning_content field
Comment in code: 'This is identical to GLM's format since GLM is OpenAI-compatible'

sources.title: Cairn SSE Parser - Shared by GLM and OpenAI
keyInsights: SSE spec: data: lines, empty line dispatches, [DONE] sentinel, : comments ignored
Same parser works for both GLM and OpenAI - identical SSE format
Multiple data: lines joined with newline per SSE spec

sources.title: Cairn Config - GLM Provider Configuration
keyInsights: API key env vars: LLM_API_KEY > GLM_API_KEY > ZHIPU_API_KEY > OPENAI_API_KEY
Provider auto-detected from key env var name
Default GLM model: glm-5-turbo
Default GLM base URL: https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4
'zhipu' provider name normalized to 'glm'

sources.title: Cairn LLM Client Design Doc
keyInsights: GLM provider: raw HTTP + SSE parsing approach (no SDK dependency)
reasoning_content field maps to ReasoningDelta events
network_error finish_reason: auto-retry then fallback
thinking parameter enabled by default
Retry config: 429, 500, 502, 503 are retryable
Fallback chain: glm-5-turbo -> glm-4.7 -> error

sources.title: Zhipu AI Python SDK - GitHub Repository
keyInsights: Default base URL: https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/
Auth via api_key param or ZHIPUAI_API_KEY env var
Streaming: stream=True, iterate chunks with delta.content
Tools: web_search type with search_query and search_result
Character models: meta param with user_info, bot_info

sources.title: Python SDK - Streaming Chunk Type Definitions
keyInsights: ChoiceDelta has reasoning_content: Optional[str] alongside content
ChoiceDelta also has audio: Optional[AudioCompletionChunk]
CompletionUsage tracks prompt_tokens_details (cached_tokens) and completion_tokens_details (reasoning_tokens)
Tool calls in delta: index, id, function (name + arguments), type

sources.title: Python SDK - Non-Streaming Response Type Definitions
keyInsights: CompletionMessage has reasoning_content: Optional[str] alongside content
Non-streaming also returns reasoning separately from content
Response includes request_id for tracking

sources.title: Python SDK - Error Types
keyInsights: Error hierarchy: ZhipuAIError -> APIStatusError -> specific errors
Specific errors: APIAuthenticationError, APIReachLimitError, APIInternalError, APIServerFlowExceedError
APIResponseValidationError for schema mismatches
Status code available via APIStatusError.status_code

sources.title: GLM Cookbook - Function Calling Tutorial
keyInsights: Tool definition format identical to OpenAI
tool_choice: 'auto' supported
finish_reason: 'tool_calls' when model requests function execution
Tool results sent back as role: 'tool' with tool_call_id

sources.title: GLM Cookbook - Multiple Function Calls Tutorial
keyInsights: Parallel tool calls supported - multiple tool_calls in one response
tool_choice: 'required' forces tool usage
'strict': True supported in tool definitions
Tool call IDs and order must match exactly

sources.title: GLM Cookbook - OpenAI SDK Compatibility Guide
keyInsights: OpenAI client works with base_url='https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/'
All standard OpenAI features work: chat, images, embeddings, tool calls
Model name: 'glm-4.5' used in example
Quote: 'Other examples (such as tool calls) can also be called in the same way as OpenAI'

sources.title: GLM Cookbook - Raw HTTP Request Tutorial
keyInsights: Standard endpoint: https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/chat/completions
JWT auth: split api_key into id+secret, create HS256 JWT
Request body: model, messages, max_tokens, temperature, stream
Streaming returns chunked data with delta.content

sources.title: Z.ai Chat Interface
keyInsights: Z.ai is the consumer product by Zhipu AI
Powered by GLM-5 and GLM-4.7 models
Positioned as 'free and open-source ChatGPT alternative'
Supports text generation, reasoning, and deep research

sources.title: GLM-4-9B-Chat Model Card on HuggingFace
keyInsights: 128K context length, 9B parameters, BF16
Function calling: 81% accuracy on Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard
26 languages supported
Available for local deployment via transformers and vLLM

sources.title: GLM-4 Open Source Repository
keyInsights: Model variants: GLM-4-9B, GLM-4-32B, GLM-Z1 (reasoning), GLM-Z1-Rumination (deep reasoning)
YaRN rope scaling: 32K native extended to 128K
GLM-Z1-Rumination: deep thinking with search, no custom tools/system prompts
Tools prepended to message list in fixed template

sources.title: Zhipu AI Python SDK on PyPI
keyInsights: Latest version: 2.1.5.20250825
Python 3.8+ required
Dependencies: httpx, pydantic, typing-extensions
Active maintenance since 2020

sources.title: GLM Cookbook Repository
keyInsights: Official tutorial repository by MetaGLM
Examples: function calling, HTTP requests, OpenAI SDK, embeddings, retrieval
SDKs available for Python, Java, C#, Node.js
GLM-4.5 integrated with Claude Code
